senses.definition: a collection of written or spoken material stored on a computer and used to find out how language is used

examples.sentence: All the dictionary examples are taken from a corpus of billions of words.
examples.translation: 字典中的所有例子都取自一個收錄了數十億詞彙的語料庫。

senses.definition: a collection of a single writer's work, or of writing about a particular subject
a body or the main part of an organ
